branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Gravity / black-hole observable; matter-side per Einstein-eq source coupling

description: Penrose energy-extraction process on the rotating defect. The defect carries a small phase charge Q = 0.06 (in lattice units) which couples weakly to the rotational modes; the Penrose process therefore emerges from the same Kerr structure as the ergosphere geometry. Distilled from outputs_black_hole_thermo/bht06_penrose_process.json. Both regimes are sub-extremal in J/M^2.
framing: The Penrose process is a derivable consequence of the rotating-defect Kerr structure; the small phase charge Q = 0.06 is a lattice-level book-keeping quantity, not a physical electric charge.
